title: austrostipa muelleri
intro: Austrostipa muelleri, also known as blue grass, is a perennial grass species native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Austrostipa muelleri include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
